title: Roldana manantlanensis
taxonomy: Roldana manantlanensis is classified in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Roldana, which is a group of flowering plants native to Central America. The genus Roldana is further divided into several species, with Roldana manantlanensis being one of them. The species is also known to be closely related to other plants in the same family, such as the genus Senecio. Roldana manantlanensis is often placed in the subfamily Asteroideae, a large and diverse group within the Asteraceae family.

More research is needed to fully understand the medicinal uses and potential applications of this plant.
